rateSource: Tax Foundation, 2024 average effective property tax rate
billingDescription: Indiana counties bill property taxes semi-annually, due in early May and early November.
homesteadDeduction: Indiana offers a Homestead Standard Deduction (up to $48,000 or 60% of assessed value, whichever is less) plus a Supplemental Homestead Deduction. Real tax bills for primary residences are typically lower than these estimates.
verificationSource: Verify exact taxes with your county assessor or auditor
